svg.font-family: Segoe UI, "Helvetica Neue", Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
svg.text: Azure regions · SKUs · zone redundancy · scaling · CI/CD · DR posture

g.text: Subscription: ATT-AARA-PROD · Resource Groups: rg-aara-net, rg-aara-app, rg-aara-data, rg-aara-ops · Tags: env=prod, costCenter=aara, owner=raja@att.com
PRIMARY · Azure Region: East US 2 · Availability Zones: 1, 2, 3 (ZRS)
DR · Azure Region: West US 3 · warm-standby, geo-paired
App ID / password: Key Vault refs
Activated via Front Door origin swap
Steps: 1) Cosmos failover 2) Front Door origin swap 3) DNS TTL bump 4) Sentinel alert
Primary: ExpressRoute via East US 2 gateway
Backup: ExpressRoute via West US 3 gateway
Same AskAT&T endpoint serves both regions
Reserved capacity: agreed quota with AskAT&T team
· 24 hr lead time to scale (notified by ServiceNow)
· model pinned to a versioned alias
CI/CD · GitHub Actions → Azure DevOps environments · IaC: Bicep
GH Actions: lint · unit · OWASP dep-check · SBOM (CycloneDX) · container scan (Defender)
ADO Environments with approval gates · slot-deploy + smoke test · auto-rollback on health-check fail
network · app · data · ops · what-if on PR · drift-detection nightly
GitHub OIDC → Azure (no static creds) · Key Vault references resolved at deploy
